name: Falafel (Dakroub)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak fava beans in cold water for several days, changing the water daily.
2. When ready, peel the beans and grind them with onion using a meat grinder.
3. Add all ingredients to the mixture and mix well.
4. Grind the mixture again.
5. Form into patties and fry.
Variation:
Soak 3/4 cup of dried hummus (chickpea) along with fava beans, then follow the above steps.
